name: Pistachio Ambrosia
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit cocktail, pineapple, and oranges, reserving 3 cups of juice.
2. Set the fruit aside.
3. Pour the reserved juice into a 4-quart bowl.
4. Add the instant pistachi mix to the bowl and stir until smooth.
5. Stir in the sour cream until combined.
6. Add the thawed frozen whipped topping and stir until smooth.
7. Gently fold in the fruit mixture.
8. Chill the dessert for several hours.
9. If desired, top with chopped pecans just before serving.
